license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8hhht36
title: cDNA synthesis
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: for cDNA synthesis use sythesis Kit for e.g. the BioRad iScript cDNA synthesis Kit (Cat.# 1708891)
use 200 ng of RNA for reaction
the reaction protocol reverse transcription was carried out at 42° C for 30 min
The reverse transcriptaseinactivation was performed at 85° C for 5 min
used directly or stored at -20° C
